reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and returned the correct response "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface showing multiple agents in the sidebar
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260508-003848-wsiw" in the sidebar — Agent opened, displaying chat interface with message input field
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message displayed in chat, agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed work in approximately 11 seconds (well within timeout)

Verified response contains "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." with checkmarks confirming both tool calls (Open Browser and Browser Command) executed successfully

Took screenshot to document the result — Screenshot shows the complete successful interaction with the agent, including the browser preview panel displaying the actual Example Domain webpage and the activity log showing all executed browser actions
